title: Fault-Waveform Pack (ADR-030 decision-layer validation, PR-1)
description: SME-elicited fault signature pack consumed by scripts/tools/dx/waveform_compile.py. Two hard tiers: SME semantic fields (validator says 退回 SME on gaps) vs platform fields (validator says 平台補填). Anti-tautology: source enum forbids deriving waveforms from rule thresholds; independent_of_rule_conversion is a const-true attestation.

id.description: Pack slug; used as output file stem by --compile.

domain.description: Domain of the SME (e.g. oracle-dba, storage, network).

author_role.description: Role of the person the semantics came from (blind-write governance audit trail).

independent_of_rule_conversion.description: Attestation: waveform parameters were provided by an SME NOT involved in writing/converting the VM rules, and were NOT reverse-engineered from rule thresholds (ADR-030 D2 anti-tautology). Must be literally true.

readback_signed_off.description: Whether the SME confirmed the --render-readback output matches their intent (readback sign-off gate).

description.description: SME field: free-text description of the fault.

source.description: SME field: provenance of the signature (anti-tautology enum). self-test-seed packs are compiler-gated behind --allow-selftest and are excluded from catch-rate numerator/denominator.

normal_level.description: SME field: normal operating level, native units. Direction-neutral: fault_level may be above OR below.

fault_level.description: SME field: level during the fault, native units. Real magnitude, NOT a rule threshold.

onset_duration.description: SME field: how fast things degrade from normal to fault level.

hold_duration.description: SME field: how long the fault level persists.

typical_wobble.description: SME field: everyday wobble amplitude in native units (NOT a percentage). Required unless metric_kind is boolean (noise exemption, auto-justified in output metadata).

dips_back.description: SME field: does the signal temporarily dip back toward normal during the fault?

depth.description: Dip depth toward normal_level, native units.

dip_detail.description: SME field: required when dips_back is true.

agent_keeps_reporting.description: SME field: does the monitoring agent keep emitting data during the fault?

must_detect.description: SME field: would you want to be paged at 3am for this? (catch-rate ground truth)

metric.description: Platform field: exporter metric name, taken from the exporter catalog (NOT from a rule pack).

metric_kind.description: Platform field: compile semantics. gauge=direct level; counter=levels are RATES, integrated into a monotone cumulative series; boolean=noise exemption + flapping/staleness-absence/fan-out variants.

level.description: Steady-state level for the companion series.

companion_series.description: Platform field: denominators / companions for ratio- or join-shaped alerts.

shape_class.description: Platform field: waveform envelope class (maps back to ADR-030 R2-5 shape taxonomy).

noise_kind.description: Platform field: noise distribution. Compiler default; never asked of the SME.

jitter_s.description: Per-sample timestamp jitter bound in seconds. Must stay below STEP/2 (=15) so jitter can never reorder samples — an out-of-order counter series reads as a phantom rate() reset. Materialization (b) only; (a) promtool values: notation cannot express it.

dropout_pattern.description: Scrape dropout: 'every:N' drops every Nth sample (index>0), or an explicit list of 0-based sample indices.

staleness_tail.description: Truncate this much duration off the series tail (staleness / agent death at the end).

time_axis.description: Platform field: time-axis perturbations (jitter / dropout / staleness).

fault_class.description: Platform field: slug derived from the SME description; assigned by the platform engineer.

labels.description: Platform field: topology labels. PR-1 seeds use neutral placeholders; PR-2 wires the harness.
